Notes: Satisfy a prerequisite proving miss.campus.edu. is in use, then attempt delete_rr for an RRtype/owner pair that is not present (A at miss.campus.edu.) while another RR at the name remains. The observable oracle is the UPDATE reply code; the post-state should remain unchanged.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite matches the existing helper RRset, then request deletion of an absent RR at the same owner name.

Steps.Name: miss.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the zone contents at miss.campus.edu. are unchanged regardless of UPDATE reply code.
